  "findings": [
    "Over-greasing has blown/purged the bearing seal",
    "Excessive grease pressure has compromised the sealing lip integrity"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop greasing operations immediately",
    "Relieve internal pressure by removing the grease relief plug",
    "Clean purged grease from the housing and surrounding area",
    "Inspect the seal for permanent deformation or tearing",
    "Replace the damaged seal and verify correct grease fill volume per OEM specifications"
  ],
  "rationale": "Over-greasing has caused the seal to purge/blow out. Continuing operation or further greasing without relieving pressure, cleaning, and inspecting/replacing the compromised seal will lead to premature bearing failure due to contaminant ingress and loss of lubrication control.",
  "references": [
    "SKF Bearing Installation and Maintenance Guide",
    "Timken Engineering Manual: Lubrication and Seals"
  ]
}
